description: Legal document (זכרון עדות). Dating: likely early 13th century. Involves Abū Manṣūr al-Shā[...], Ṭāhir b. [...], something being certified for a woman, and a sum of nuqra dirhams. In the margin we learn that the woman is named Sadīdiyya (סדידיה) and that the witnesses are Shela and Saʿadya. Reused on recto for unidentified jottings. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
